settings.title: General
Who are we?
settings.answer: We're Better Bet (formerly known as alt foods), a 100% plant based brand founded by 3 vegans inspired by personal struggles in finding a satisfying plant based milk. This novel product is the result of over 18 months of years of ground-breaking R&D. The result: the world's first plant-based milk made from sprouted millets and grains.

settings.title: What products does Better Bet have?
settings.answer: Better Bet currently has 4 flavours of plant based drinks- Original, Vanilla, Chocolate and Mango. Do subscribe to our newsletters to stay updated.

settings.title: What is our mission?
settings.answer: We are on a mission to provide a "better" version of the food that you consume everyday. With your health in our mind and love for mother earth in our heart, we strive to create sustainable products with a lot more nutrition than the traditional foods. Our dedication to quality ingredients, innovation, and mindful consumption empowers individuals to embrace a healthier lifestyle while respecting our planet.

settings.title: Product
What are the ingredients in your product?
settings.answer: The hero ingredients in our products include sprouted finger millets (ragi), sprouted sorghum (jowar), amaranth (rajgiri) and oats.

settings.title: How should I store your product?
settings.answer: It is a shelf stable product. Once opened keep in refrigerator and consume within 3 days. Keep away from direct sunlight.

settings.title: What is the shelf life of your product?
settings.answer: 12 months.

settings.title: Are your products vegan or gluten-free?
settings.answer:
We are and will always be a 100% plant based brand.
We use oats as an ingredient which may naturally contain traces of gluten.

settings.title: Can your product be used for multiple purposes?
settings.answer: Absolutely, our products are designed to be highly versatile and are suitable for various purposes. You can use it just like dairy milk in your everyday routine. Whether it's in your morning coffee, tea, cereal, baking recipes, or cooking savory dishes, our plant-based drink provides a seamless option that maintains the creamy texture and taste you're accustomed to.

settings.title: Account
How do I register?
settings.answer: You can register yourself by clicking on this Registration Link. Upon subscribing, you can enjoy regular updates about product launches, offers and promotions. You can also access your purchase records and save your address which helps in a quicker checkout.

settings.title: Do I have to share my email ID and phone number?
settings.answer:
Yes. We use them to send you live updates on your order and information about offers and promotions.
We maintain all safeguards to ensure that your details are stored securly.

settings.title: How Do I Reset My Password?
settings.answer: To reset your password, please click on the “Forgot my Password” option available in the ‘Sign In’ section. A link to set a new password will be mailed to your registered Email ID.

settings.title: Shipping
What is your shipping policy?
settings.answer:
Same Day Deliveries for orders in Delhi NCR, Pune, Bangalore, Hyderabad and Mumbai, (orders before 3pm). Please check if your pincode is a part of the servicable list by entering it on the product page.

For rest of India, once the order is dispatched, under normal conditions, it will be delivered within 2-4 business days for deliveries in North India and 5-7 business days for deliveries to the Rest of India.

settings.title: What is your shipping cost?
settings.answer:
Shipping costs are based on the delivery method. To find out how much your order will cost, please add the items you would like to purchase to your cart, and proceed to the checkout page.
Free Shipping is provided on orders above Rs 1500/- Once at the checkout screen, shipping charges will be displayed.

settings.title: How will I know if my order is confirmed?
settings.answer: You will receive an email upon order confirmation. Please contact us if you have not received it - support@betterbet.in / +91 78668 00020

settings.title: When will my order be shipped?
settings.answer: Our orders normally get shipped out within 3-4 business days of order placement. Final delivery time will be intimated to you at the time of order confirmation.

settings.title: Can I change my order?
settings.answer: Pls let us know as soon as you place an order. We will try our best to cater to you.

settings.title: What can I do if I have entered an incorrect address?
settings.answer: Please contact our customer service as soon as possible. If your order hasn’t been processed yet, we’ll change the address. If an order has already been processed or shipped, we will contact our shipping partner to ask if they can return the package to us or change the delivery address. Unfortunately, this isn’t always possible. In that case, our customer service will discuss the situation with you in order to find an appropriate solution.

settings.title: How do I redeem a discount code?
settings.answer: When your order is complete, go to the checkout page. The discount code can be entered on this page. The discount will be deducted immediately.

settings.title: Returns
What is your return policy?
settings.answer: If your products arrive damaged or past their expiration date on delivery, we will be happy to issue a replacement/credit note. Please contact us at support@betterbet.in with details describing the problem supported by photographic evidence within 48 hours of delivery.

settings.title: Which products are eligible for returns?
settings.answer: You can replace or return the product if it arrives damaged or past their expiration date on delivery. You need to inform us of any damages o expiration date within 48 hours of delivery of the product, in order to receive the replacement.

settings.title: What happens if I have received a damaged product?
settings.answer:
You can immediately contact us on our customer care email - support@betterbet.in and we will look into it.

We'll require photo proof of the products along with the order details. We will review your case and if fair, we will resend the products to you at no cost, subject to availability. Please remember that we only accept return requests within 48 hours of delivery.

settings.title: When will I receive a replacement?
settings.answer: Answer
